channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 58/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 58/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 15%.

item.title: i Politics: 'It's like The Thick of It': The toe-curling revelations in Mandelson's private messages

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: It's bleakly funny in its own way that Keir Starmer and Morgan McSweeney took such an avoidable and predictable risk in order to appoint someone who (correctly) had the measure of their limitations and did not agree w...
item.description: It's bleakly funny in its own way that Keir Starmer and Morgan McSweeney took such an avoidable and predictable risk in order to appoint someone who (correctly) had the measure of their limitations and did not agree w...
